title: send_payment calls next_diversifier without ensuring account row exists; fails on fresh wallet
description: payment.rs send_payment calls store.next_diversifier(PAYMENT_ACCOUNT) directly without first calling store.ensure_account(PAYMENT_ACCOUNT). next_diversifier bails with 'account N not found' if no accounts row exists. On a freshly created wallet where ensure_account has never been called, send_payment returns a confusing DB error instead of a clear 'wallet not initialized' message. The fix is to call ensure_account(PAYMENT_ACCOUNT) at wallet creation time (in the init path) or at the top of send_payment. The same gap exists in alloc_fresh_address which calls next_diversifier via the CLI flow.
